posts.author: elitemmapicks
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Ateba Gautier vs Ozzy Diaz
Pick: Gautier via round 1 KO
99% of Tapology users (207 users) are picking Gautier (97% KO)
Gautier is 11.4 years younger (24.1 vs 35.5)
Gautier has 2” reach edge (81” vs 79”)
Gautier has +1.51 strike differential/min vs -0.79
Gautier proj. +59.2 significant strikes attempted
Gautier proj. +20.0 significant strikes landed
Gautier proj. +23.7 head strikes landed
Gautier proj. 2.47 knockdowns vs 0.00 (Gautier has 4.4% knockdown rate)
Gautier proj. 47.9% finish chance vs 34.6% and 17.5% decision
7/8 KO’s for Gautier were in round 1
2/3 times KO’d for Diaz were in round 1 (1/3 in round 2)

posts.author: elitemmapicks
posts.content:
[Predictions]

Roman Kopylov vs Marco Tulio
Pick: Tulio via decision
57% of Tapology users (190 users) are picking Tulio (71% decision)
Tulio is 2.1 years younger (31.9 vs 34.1)
Kopylov has 1” reach edge (75” vs 74”)
Tulio has +4.11 strike differential/min vs -0.59
Tulio proj. +51.4 significant strikes attempted
Tulio proj. +35.9 significant strikes landed
Tulio proj. +22.4 head strikes landed
Tulio proj. 0.84 knockdowns vs 0.50
Tulio proj. 1.0 takedowns landed (5.5 attempts) vs 0.0 (2.4 attempts)
Tulio proj. 39.6% finish chance vs 37.8% and 22.5% decision
Tulio will likely win striking, head striking and is more likely to get knockdown/finish
Good upside on Tulio via finish (decision is safer play)

[Predictions]

Alexander Volkov vs Waldo Cortes Acosta
Pick: Cortes Acosta via round 2 KO

Cortes Acosta has 42% head strike accuracy, 74% head strike defense
Volkov has 48% head strike accuracy, 65% head strike defense
Cortes Acosta has 9 pt edge in HSD, Volkov has 6 pt edge in HSA
Cortes Acosta proj. 0.38 knockdowns vs 0.09

4/9 KO’s for Cortes Acosta were in round 1

As much as I’ve enjoyed Waldo’s resurgence from one of the most dull heavyweights on the roster to one of the dopest, Volkov is one step too far about his pay-rate. Volkov is pretty much one of maybe four heavyweights in the roster who is actually a technical striker and not just a bloated mcboogerballs lookin’ ***********er who’s whole gameplan is swinging at the air like a paint huffing schizophrenic at McDonalds who just got told his six piece McNugget coupon just expired.
